metadata.description: LayerAxis illustration workflow plugins — a 2-agent automated pipeline, a 5-agent gated pipeline, and a standalone prompt generator.

plugins.name: layeraxis-v4-2agent
plugins.description: LayerAxis V4 two-agent pipeline (creative → render). Reads an article, designs illustrations, and batch-generates images.

plugins.name: layeraxis-v4-5agent
plugins.description: SPEC V4 five-agent gated pipeline (lock → outline → scene → prompt → render). Offers fine-grained checkpoints and stage replay.

plugins.name: article-illustration-prompt
plugins.description: Standalone prompt generator for article illustrations using Digital Rationalism × Human-Centered Minimalism visual style.
